artPrompt: An airy town square bathed in unflinching noon brightness, dozens of soft-focus neighbors leaning over fences and shading their eyes, every gaze converging on a single small figure at the center who seems to shrink beneath the collective watching; sunlight pours like a glaze of accountability across ivory clapboard and leafy hedges, an ongoing hush of scrutiny made visible, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Sunshine Ordinance
text:
Players play with their hands revealed... no, just kidding, that's too far. Instead:
Whenever an opponent who controls the most permanents casts a spell, you create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (Every backroom deal recruits another volunteer.)
flavorText: Transparency in government, brought to you by the sheer number of people watching the mayor very, very closely.

extras.frontrunnerPunish: triggers off the leader casting spells
